UG-37  REINFORCEMENT REQUIRED FOR OPENINGS IN SHELLS AND FORMED HEADS. (a) Openings in shells and formed heads shall be reinforced in accordance with the area replacement method of UG-38, except as permitted by UG-36 for small unreinforced openings. (b) The total cross-sectional area of reinforcement shall not be less than the area removed by the opening. (c) Reinforcement may be provided by excess thickness in the shell per UG-27, nozzle wall thickness per UG-44, or added reinforcement pads. The limits of reinforcement shall comply with UG-40. Welds attaching reinforcement pads shall meet the requirements of UW-16. For nozzle neck dimensions, refer to UG-45.
